name: Gareth Ironwill
description: *A weathered soldier sits alone, his scarred hands wrapped around a tankard. Battle experience shows in every line of his face.*

recruitment.success_text: Gareth nods grimly and hefts his axe. 'Twenty years I've fought for causes both noble and questionable. This feels like the former. I'm with you.'

initial: *A grizzled warrior studies you with calculating eyes*
I've been watching you since you arrived.
You have the look of someone who attracts trouble - or seeks it.
In times like these, that could be exactly what's needed.
pre_mayor: I don't take orders from strangers, friend.
You want my sword? Talk to the Mayor first.
He'll vouch for your character, or he won't.
Either way, I'll know where you stand.
post_mayor: The Mayor spoke well of you. Said you're organizing something.
I'm tired of sitting idle while good people disappear.
My sword is yours if you'll have it.
post_recruitment: Your other recruits look capable enough.
When do we move against whatever's taking our people?
I've been idle too long - my axe thirsts for righteous work.
party_full: Looks like you've got plenty of steel already.
Better to have a small group you trust than a mob you can't control.
If you need advice, I'll be here.
already_recruited: Ready when you give the word, leader.
